verdict: Pet-friendly with size limits · no short-term rentals · no rental cap

rules.label: Pets
rules.summary: Up to 2 pets per unit. Dogs must be ≤15 kg. Council approval required.

rules.label: Long-term rentals
rules.summary: No cap on rentals. 6-month minimum lease term.

rules.label: Short-term rentals (Airbnb)
rules.summary: Rentals under 30 days prohibited. $500 weekly fine for breach.

rules.label: Smoking (tobacco)
rules.summary: Allowed in units. Prohibited on balconies and in common areas.

rules.label: Cannabis
rules.summary: Smoking and growing prohibited throughout the building, including units.

rules.label: Balcony BBQs
rules.summary: Electric BBQs only. Propane and charcoal prohibited.

rules.label: EV charging
rules.summary: Owner-installed Level 2 chargers permitted with council approval; owner covers wiring and metering.

rules.label: Move-ins & deliveries
rules.summary: $200 fee per move. Weekdays 9am–4pm only. Elevator booking required.

rules.label: Parking
rules.summary: 1 stall assigned per unit. May rent to other owners only — not non-residents.

rules.label: Pool & gym
rules.summary: Pool 6am–10pm. Gym 24/7. Guests must be accompanied by a resident.
